tag_descriptions.Tag Protection: Impinj TagProtect prevents unauthorized cloning and reading of tags using a password-based protection mechanism. It renders a tag invisible to an RFID reader unless the correct 32-bit password is provided.
tag_descriptions.FastID: Impinj FastID embeds the tag TID along with the EPC in every inventory response, eliminating the need for separate TID read operations and improving throughput.
tag_descriptions.TagFocus: Impinj TagFocus instructs tags that have already been inventoried to remain unresponsive, enabling the reader to focus on other unread tags. Targets tags in session S1.
tag_descriptions.Tag Quieting: Impinj TagQuieting selectively silences individual tags to reduce tag churn and improve read accuracy in dense tag environments.
tag_descriptions.Configuration: Retrieve the current Gen2X feature configuration from the reader.
tag_descriptions.Control Commands: Start and stop the radio while applying Gen2X configuration.
